tooltips.holidayManagementAnnualEntitlementDays: Annual days granted by default when a holiday profile is initialized.
tooltips.holidayManagementResetDate: Default annual reset date in MM-DD format.
tooltips.holidayManagementResetCeilingDays: Balances above this value require the later reset workflow to remain pending or use an administrator exception.
tooltips.holidayManagementResetWarningDays: Start warning before reaching the reset ceiling.
tooltips.holidayManagementNegativeBalanceLimitDay: The lowest permitted balance. Use zero or a negative number.
tooltips.holidayManagementApproverRole: The selected role may contain at most two active regular or administrator users.
tooltips.holidayManagementApprovalBlock1Title: Printed title for the first approval block.
tooltips.holidayManagementApprovalBlock1Name: Optional printed-name override. Leave blank to use the actual approver name.
tooltips.holidayManagementApprovalBlock2Title: Printed title for the second approval block.
tooltips.holidayManagementApprovalBlock2Name: Optional printed-name override. Leave blank to use the actual approver name.
